criteria_verification.evidence: Added LifecycleEmitterAdapter class to src/forge/subagents/autobuild_runner.py with LIFECYCLE_TO_PIPELINE_EMIT routing table mapping 'awaiting_approval' -> 'emit_paused'. The adapter implements SubagentEmitter Protocol, schedules emit_paused on the running event loop, and threads the BuildContext.correlation_id onto the envelope. Verified by TestPausePublishAwaitingApproval::test_update_state_awaiting_approval_publishes_build_paused which asserts subject == 'pipeline.build-paused.FEAT-X' and envelope.correlation_id == 'corr-001'.

The adapter implements SubagentEmitter Protocol, schedules emit_paused on the running event loop, and threads the BuildContext.correlation_id onto the envelope. Verified by TestPausePublishAwaitingApproval::test_update_state_awaiting_approval_publishes_build_paused which asserts subject == 'pipeline.build-paused.FEAT-X' and envelope.correlation_id == 'corr-001'.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: When the approval subscriber matches an approval response with
criteria_verification.evidence: Added optional lifecycle_emitter, build_context, expected_correlation_id parameters to ApprovalSubscriber.await_response. Added per-build _resume_publish_ctx mapping populated on await_response and consumed in _on_envelope. When a first-arrival valid response is enqueued, the subscriber awaits emitter.emit_resumed() BEFORE queue.put(payload). Verified by TestResumePublishOnApproval::test_first_arrival_publishes_build_resumed and test_resume_published_before_orchestrator_advances which assert publish ordering precedes queue dequeue.
criteria_verification.notes: Added optional lifecycle_emitter, build_context, expected_correlation_id parameters to ApprovalSubscriber.await_response. When a first-arrival valid response is enqueued, the subscriber awaits emitter.emit_resumed() BEFORE queue.put(payload). Verified by TestResumePublishOnApproval::test_first_arrival_publishes_build_resumed and test_resume_published_before_orchestrator_advances which assert publish ordering precedes queue dequeue.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: An approval response with a mismatched correlation_id does NOT
criteria_verification.evidence: Added correlation-id allowlist check in ApprovalSubscriber._on_envelope (Step 2b): when expected_correlation_id is registered for the build and envelope.correlation_id mismatches, the subscriber logs WARNING and returns early — emit_resumed is NOT called and the response is not enqueued. Verified by TestMismatchedCorrelationIdRejected::test_mismatched_correlation_does_not_publish_resumed.
criteria_verification.notes: Added correlation-id allowlist check in ApprovalSubscriber._on_envelope (Step 2b): when expected_correlation_id is registered for the build and envelope.correlation_id mismatches, the subscriber logs WARNING and returns early — emit_resumed is NOT called and the response is not enqueued. Verified by TestMismatchedCorrelationIdRejected::test_mismatched_correlation_does_not_publish_resumed.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: After a daemon restart while a build is paused, the build
criteria_verification.evidence: Verified by tests/integration/test_pause_resume_e2e.py::TestPauseResumeRoundTrip::test_pause_restart_resume_round_trip which simulates a daemon restart by re-instantiating LifecycleEmitterAdapter with the SAME emitter+ctx and calling _update_state(awaiting_approval) on the rehydrated state. Asserts that two build-paused publishes occur and the second envelope's correlation_id == CORRELATION_ID (verbatim reuse, ADR-ARCH-021). Existing recover_paused_builds in src/forge/gating/wrappers.py already handles approval-request re-emission with the persisted request_id (R5 closure).
criteria_verification.notes: Verified by tests/integration/test_pause_resume_e2e.py::TestPauseResumeRoundTrip::test_pause_restart_resume_round_trip which simulates a daemon restart by re-instantiating LifecycleEmitterAdapter with the SAME emitter+ctx and calling _update_state(awaiting_approval) on the rehydrated state. Asserts that two build-paused publishes occur and the second envelope's correlation_id == CORRELATION_ID (verbatim reuse, ADR-ARCH-021). Existing recover_paused_builds in src/forge/gating/wrappers.py already handles approval-request re-emission with the persisted request_id (R5 closure).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Only the first approval response wins (idempotent first-wins
criteria_verification.evidence: The existing _check_and_record dedup buffer in ApprovalSubscriber arbitrates duplicates under asyncio.Lock. The new emit_resumed call is gated AFTER dedup so a second matching response is dropped before reaching the publish path. Verified by TestFirstResponseWins::test_second_matching_response_is_dedup_dropped (sequential dedup) and test_only_first_approval_advances_orchestrator in the e2e suite (concurrent dedup via asyncio.gather on two identical envelopes). Both assert exactly one build-resumed publish and one queue entry.
criteria_verification.notes: The existing _check_and_record dedup buffer in ApprovalSubscriber arbitrates duplicates under asyncio.Lock. The new emit_resumed call is gated AFTER dedup so a second matching response is dropped before reaching the publish path. Verified by TestFirstResponseWins::test_second_matching_response_is_dedup_dropped (sequential dedup) and test_only_first_approval_advances_orchestrator in the e2e suite (concurrent dedup via asyncio.gather on two identical envelopes). Both assert exactly one build-resumed publish and one queue entry.

criteria_verification.evidence: LifecycleEmitterAdapter._safe_run wraps every scheduled coroutine in try/except, logging at WARNING (DDR-007 §Failure-mode contract). ApprovalSubscriber._on_envelope wraps the emit_resumed call in try/except, logging at WARNING; the queue still receives the payload so the orchestrator can resume even on a transient publish hiccup. PipelineLifecycleEmitter._safe_publish (existing) already swallows PublishFailure. Verified by TestPublishFailureContract::test_publish_failure_on_pause_logs_warning and test_publish_failure_on_resume_logs_warning — both assert state continues, queue receives, and WARNING/ERROR is logged.
criteria_verification.notes: LifecycleEmitterAdapter._safe_run wraps every scheduled coroutine in try/except, logging at WARNING (DDR-007 §Failure-mode contract). PipelineLifecycleEmitter._safe_publish (existing) already swallows PublishFailure. Verified by TestPublishFailureContract::test_publish_failure_on_pause_logs_warning and test_publish_failure_on_resume_logs_warning — both assert state continues, queue receives, and WARNING/ERROR is logged.
